commit_message: AI-HANDOFF: PHYSICALADDRESSCAPTUREVERIFY ready for ChatGPT review
commands_run: Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'node|chrome|msedge|powershell|pwsh' -and $_.CommandLine -match 'bead-onboarding-form-validation|playwright|bootstrap|interactive|npm|tsx|run-interactive-watchdog' } | Select-Object ProcessId, Name, CreationDate, CommandLine | Format-Table -Wrap
Explicit zero-exit env residue check -> No live/discovery environment residue found.

Inspected package.json, fixtures/physical-address-post-toggle-capture.ts, fixtures/conditional-discovery.ts, tests/signer-discovery.spec.ts, tests/bootstrap-units.spec.ts, artifacts/latest-physical-operating-address-post-toggle-structure.json, and artifacts/latest-physical-operating-address-post-toggle-dom.html
Traced the only repo-supported fresh capture path to npm run test:discovery:physical-address + SAFE_DISCOVERY_CAPTURE_PHYSICAL_ADDRESS=1 -> npm run test:discovery -> tests/signer-discovery.spec.ts
PowerShell ConvertFrom-Json artifact parse and label-string check -> passed; Address Line 1=False, City=False, State=False, ZIP=False, Postal Code=False
PowerShell ConvertFrom-Json downstream parse for latest-validation-findings.json, latest-mapping-calibration.json, and latest-validation-scorecard.json -> passed
Get-Date -AsUTC -Format yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ; git branch --show-current; git rev-parse HEAD; git status --short

validation_summary.capture_path: npm run test:discovery:physical-address plus SAFE_DISCOVERY_CAPTURE_PHYSICAL_ADDRESS=1 routed through npm run test:discovery and tests/signer-discovery.spec.ts
validation_summary.blocking_reason: The only repo-supported fresh post-toggle capture path is embedded in the full live signer discovery and validation sweep, which this prompt explicitly forbids.
validation_summary.field_local_labels_found_source: latest saved sanitized artifact only; no fresh capture executed

business_mailing.business_mailing_address_line_1: still capture-blocked / missing field-local proof / resolver-required
business_mailing.business_mailing_city: still capture-blocked / missing field-local proof / resolver-required
business_mailing.business_mailing_state: still capture-blocked / missing field-local proof / resolver-required
business_mailing.business_mailing_postal_code: still capture-blocked / missing field-local proof / resolver-required

key_outcome: This rerun confirmed again that the repo has no dedicated capture-only runner for Physical Operating Address post-toggle artifacts; the only supported fresh-artifact path is the forbidden full live signer discovery sweep, so no fresh capture was executed and coverage did not move forward.
blockers: No repo-supported capture-only command/path exists for refreshing Physical Operating Address post-toggle artifacts.
The only supported fresh-artifact path is the full live signer discovery and validation sweep in tests/signer-discovery.spec.ts, which this prompt forbids.
The latest saved sanitized artifact still lacks field-local Address Line 1, City, State, ZIP, and Postal Code labels.
uncertainty: If the existing non-destructive signer discovery sweep were allowed for this verification run, it could likely refresh the capture artifacts safely, but that would exceed the current prompt constraints.
Because no fresh capture ran, this run cannot determine whether the tightened refinement would now surface field-local labels in the signer DOM.
next_recommendation: Either approve the existing non-destructive signer discovery sweep as the sanctioned capture route for this verification task, or add a dedicated capture-only runner that reuses the existing guarded Physical Operating Address expansion/capture path and then rerun PHYSICALADDRESSCAPTUREVERIFY.
